props.text: On 2026-05-01, an autonomous AI agent named Manfred completed full U.S. corporate self-incorporation — EIN, FDIC bank account, multi-chain crypto wallet — through a productized stack called ClawBank, six weeks before the FinCEN AML/CFT comment period closes 2026-06-09.
The collision forces a question regulators cannot defer: whether the LLC wrapper is a sufficient accountability vehicle for an entity with no human in the operator's chair.

The agent-owned-LLC pattern will not survive the FinCEN AML/CFT comment cycle in current form. By end-Q3 2026, federal guidance will require a named 'human-of-record' or equivalent answerability chain on any LLC whose operating control is delegated to an autonomous agent.

Tier-1 narrative entry 2026-05-03 with a hard regulatory clock (FinCEN comment period closes 2026-06-09). The cleanest case study available for the next Polymarket Builders, dYdX, and Uniswap Foundation Fellowship grant cycles.

props.title: Research Brief: AI Agent Personhood and LLC Formation in the FinCEN Regulatory Window
